allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command psql -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Command pg_isready -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; where.exe psql 2>nul")
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State, OwningProcess")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174,8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalPort, State")

Bash(powershell -Command "& ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\resources\\bin\\docker.exe'' compose exec backend bash -c ''cd /workspace/mga/skye-e2e-tests && for f in tests/generated/*.spec.ts; do echo ""=== $f ===""; head -3 ""$f""; echo; done'' 2>&1")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; [print\(f''''{p[""name""]}: host={p[""pw_host""]}, user={p[""pw_testuser""]}, pass={""***"" if p.get\(""pw_password""\) else ""EMPTY""}, email={p[""pw_email""]}''''\) for p in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
